name: the southern tribes
identity: A cautious and selective faction that observes developments without seeking to spread or claim knowledge beyond their boundaries. They maintain a collaborative but guarded stance, prioritizing careful study and controlled integration of new ideas into their community without external influence.
current_status: Engaged in diplomatic discussions with the player about the responsibilities and boundaries of new knowledge. They have established a neutral meeting place to foster dialogue, implemented new hunting and preservation practices, and are considering how to integrate certain discoveries without external influence.

volatile_state.current_activity: Engaged in diplomatic discussions with the player about the responsibilities and boundaries of new knowledge. They have established a neutral meeting place to foster dialogue, implemented new hunting and preservation practices, and are considering how to integrate certain discoveries without external influence.
volatile_state.location: Near the longhouse and neutral meeting place beyond the traps
volatile_state.condition: Cautious but increasingly collaborative, with a focus on selective integration of new knowledge without external influence

notes: The southern tribes have adopted a more deliberate approach to knowledge integration, emphasizing observation and selective sharing. Their cautious stance remains central to their decision-making process.
